This '''old woman''' was an [[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|offshoot]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] who was forced to live in a slum in [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] by the purebreds, along with [[Zadawi's father|her son]] and her granddaughter, [[Zadawi]]. Despite her situation, she had great respect for [[Arkoh Adasca]] and [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|Adascorp]] and was convinced things would get better soon.<ref name="KOTOR 16" />

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]] {{1st}}
